title: The risk of tensions between prisoners is even higher: inmates are bearing the full brunt of the heatwave

world.newsTitle: “The risk of tensions between prisoners is even higher”: inmates are bearing the full brunt of the heatwave

environment.compositionIntent: A pale matte-paper surround holds the accepted Larry Rivers fragments as heat pressure: background washes preserve negative space, the middleground band keeps the compressed prisoner-tension signal near center, and the foreground mark field supplies restless loops, scratches, dots, and red catches without taking over the main barricade.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained for the first preview because isolated accepted parts already read as broad horizontal shallow fields with a central pressure mass.

contrast.notes: Warm high-key light preserves paper ground and ochre wash while a low dark rim keeps black registers, silhouettes, and contour marks readable.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available concept-reference image directly as advisory-only palette/value/mood evidence.
Static check succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no validation errors.
Attempt 2 Playwright preview succeeded with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok under WebGPU.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a full-surround Larry Rivers-derived pale paper environment with ochre wash fields, grey/ink rubbed horizontal registers, cropped arcs, red heat accents, contour-line pressure, and active negative space without taking over the main barricade/grid or focal knot lanes.

Attempt 2 render report includes WebGPU helper evidence for utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell and utilities.createPointParticleField plus WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, and PointsMaterial surfaces.
compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the background paper/wash shell with warm pale field, low fog, and restrained motion.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the local concept reference image directly as advisory-only palette/value/composition evidence.
Static validation passed for drafts/non-literal-fracture-pressure.module.mjs with no errors.
Playwright preview attempt 2 captured desktop evidence with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Desktop screenshot shows a readable pale paper reserve, compressed central dark silhouette mass, repeated horizontal pressure registers, fracture posts, circular arcs, and controlled red heat accents.
Render report confirms WebGPU backend, MeshBasicMaterial standard surface, color-field and procedural-marks material-factory evidence, and no forbidden shader surfaces.
compositionAdaptations: Kept in its middleground ownership lane at origin with reduced full-world scale so the central pressure band remains readable.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks

workshopAcceptance: Preview attempt 2 rendered a nonblank WebGPU desktop capture with readable foreground Larry Rivers-style contour loops, scratches, drips, splatters, stipple, and restrained dot/grid catches.

Render report for attempt 2 reported healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, rendererMode webgpu, rendererBackend webgpu, and WebGPU feature evidence for MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, animated-instanced-mark-field, animated-point-particle-field, color-field, procedural-marks, and soft-particles.
The final draft stays in the foreground artist-style lane and avoids adding another dominant middleground news-pressure band or barricade structure.
compositionAdaptations: Kept as foreground artist mark behavior at origin with reduced scale and opacity so scratches, loops, dots, and red catches texture the pressure band.
